user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a short time entry, so that I can define how short time is recorded for an employee class
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Short Time Settings screen; When I click Add short time and provide the details; Then a new short time setting is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view configured short time settings with their employee class, location, client, project, task, type of work, non productive reason and activity, so that I can review existing rules
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Short Time Settings screen; When the list loads; Then each entry shows Employee class, Location, Client, Project, Task, Type of work, Non productive reason and Activity

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing short time setting, so that I can keep the configuration accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a short time setting exists in the list; When I click Edit on that row; Then I can modify and save its details

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the short time settings list, so that I see the latest data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Short Time Settings screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads with current entries

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to navigate to related Type Of Work Settings and Email Templates tabs, so that I can manage related configuration from one place
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Short Time Settings screen; When I select the Type Of Work Settings or Email Templates tab; Then the corresponding configuration screen opens

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next step or cancel, so that I can control the configuration workflow
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Short Time Settings screen; When I click Next or Cancel; Then I advance in the flow or discard changes respectively
